.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.net.*; below import java.io.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant assignments for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH to single lines.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in string constant definitions.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard Java coding style.
Adjusted indentation and line breaks for the Authenticator anonymous class definition.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Reformatted new Authenticator() block to align with surrounding code style.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for newer JDK/Spring Boot versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability and maintainability.
Update profile retrieval logic to handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles, likely due to API changes or stricter validation in newer versions.
Integrate CRLFLogConverter marker to ensure log messages are safe for structured logging systems that might break on CRLF characters.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix formatting or encoding issues.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed '\'' to ''' in the error message string literal.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style conventions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer included or required in the updated project configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot version.

Refactor SecurityConfiguration from extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to using @Configuration with SecurityFilterChain beans, as the adapter class is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in 6.0.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 API changes where global method security configuration was moved.
Replace authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and antMatchers() with requestMatchers() to use the new lambda-based DSL in Spring Security 6.0.
Replace legacy header configuration methods with the new lambda-based headers() DSL, including renaming featurePolicy to permissionsPolicy.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler using the new exceptionHandling() lambda DSL.
Enable OAuth2 Resource Server support with JWT parsing to replace the custom JWT filter configuration, aligning with modern Spring Security standards.
Remove the explicit CorsFilter injection and add a SpaWebFilter after BasicAuthenticationFilter to handle SPA routing and CORS via standard Spring mechanisms.
Remove the separate configure(WebSecurity) method for ignoring static resources, integrating those rules into the main SecurityFilterChain or relying on default permissive rules for static assets.
Externalize Content Security Policy directives to JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them in the security configuration.
Change frame options from deny to sameOrigin to allow H2 console and other same-origin frames, adapting to stricter default security policies.
Add explicit authorization rule requiring ADMIN authority for /v3/api-docs/** endpoints, tightening security for API documentation.
Update static resource permitAll rules to explicitly list file extensions and paths like /app/**, /i18n/**, and /content/** for better clarity and control.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific patterns like '/*.js', '/*.css', '/*.svg', '/*.png', '*.ico', '/content/**', and '/i18n/*'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException which is no longer thrown by URLDecoder.decode(String, Charset) in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, required for Spring Security 6 / Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / SpringDoc endpoints, removing deprecated Swagger 2 paths.
